scripts.studio:host-smoke:inspect: PWDEBUG=1 VIVD_STUDIO_HOST_SMOKE_HEADLESS=0 VIVD_STUDIO_HOST_SMOKE_DEVTOOLS=1 VIVD_STUDIO_HOST_SMOKE_SLOW_MO_MS=250 VIVD_STUDIO_HOST_SMOKE_PAUSE_ON_FAILURE=1 node ./scripts/studio-docker-host-smoke.mjs
scripts.build:shared: npm run build --workspace=@vivd/plugin-sdk && npm run build --workspace=@vivd/shared
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/plugin-sdk && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/installed-plugins && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/builder && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/plugin-analytics && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/plugin-contact-form && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/plugin-newsletter && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/plugin-table-booking && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/backend && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/frontend && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/studio && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/cli && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/scraper && npm run typecheck --workspace=@vivd/docs
scripts.test: concurrently "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/backend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/frontend" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/cli" "npm run test --workspace=@vivd/scraper"
scripts.test:run: npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/backend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/frontend && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/cli && npm run test:run --workspace=@vivd/scraper && npm run test:self-host-assets
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:run
